tagline.en: Planting for NEXT year -- patience pays!
tagline.da: Planter til NAESTE aar -- taalmodighed betaler sig!

theme.hero_task: Plant more garlic cloves if not done in W40

tasks.action: Finish garlic planting if not completed in W40

prompt.en: Each clove becomes a whole garlic bulb by next summer -- like magic!
prompt.da: Hvert fed bliver til en hel hvidloegsknold til naeste sommer -- som magi!

prompt.en: Kale is still going strong! The cold makes it sweeter.
prompt.da: Groenkaalen er stadig i gang! Kulden goer den soedere.

tasks.action: Clear spent annual plants from Beds A and E

prompt.en: Remove dead sunflower stalks, nasturtium vines, and spent annuals. Compost everything.
prompt.da: Fjern doede solsikkestilke, nasturtie-ranker og brugte enaarige. Laeg alt i kompost.

tasks.action: Check beds for weeds -- pull any that appear

prompt.en: Any weeds? Pull them before they set seed for next year!
prompt.da: Nogen ukrudt? Traek dem op foer de saetter froe til naeste aar!

growth_events.event: Kale leaves darkening and sweetening in cold weather

prompt.en: Feel how the kale leaves are thicker now? Cold weather makes them tougher and sweeter!
prompt.da: Maaerk hvordan groenkalsbladene er tykkere nu? Koldt vejr goer dem sejere og soedere!

growth_events.event: Chives dying back for winter dormancy

prompt.en: The chives are going yellow -- they're going to sleep for winter. They'll come back in spring!
prompt.da: Purloegene bliver gule -- de gaar i vintersovn. De kommer tilbage til foraar!
